main.description: Upload a new blob to a shared repository. The blob will be deleted if it is not referenced within a time window (eg, minutes). Blob restrictions (mimetype, size, etc) are enforced when the reference is created. Requires auth and write permissions on the target repository.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repository to upload the blob to.

errors.name: RepositoryNotFound
errors.description: The specified repository could not be found.

errors.name: InsufficientPermissions
errors.description: The authenticated user does not have write permission on this repository.
